title: barleria neurophylla
intro: Barleria neurophylla is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the 'Purple Fountain Plant' due to its vibrant purple flowers. The medicinal properties of Barleria neurophylla include its antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Barleria neurophylla include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and potentially treat various fungal and bacterial infections. In herbal preparations, Barleria neurophylla is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
